name: Anna Aveiro
description: __Height:__ 165 cm A first-year high school student. Born and raised in Brazil, her mother is Japanese. She's a mood maker, assertive, and doesn't hesitate to speak her mind. She's skilled in capoeira, which she learned as a self-defense technique, and loves music.

name: Bellamy
description: __Height:__ 240 cm (7'10") __Devil Fruit:__ Bane Bane no Mi (Spring Spring Fruit) __Devil Fruit Type:__ Paramecia Bellamy "The Hyena" is the captain of the crew and has a 55,000,000 Beli bounty. Bellamy earned his nickname from his trademark grin and his reputation for scavenging riches from other pirates, much like a hyena scavenges its food. Bellamy's character is one that is arrogant, violent and vain, but significantly humbled when facing more powerful foes, as he revealed to Donquixote Dofl

name: Hakuoro
description: Hakuoro is the main protagonist who wears an irremovable mask over the top part of his head extended down to just under the eyes. He is found badly injured by Eruruu, who nurses him back to health. It is soon apparent that he has lost all of his memories, and he additionally finds that the state of the world varies significantly from his expectations (e.g. certain anatomical attributes are now considered normal, such as ears and tails). In place of his forgotten name, he is given the name Hakuor

name: Hinae Arimura
description: Hinae Arimura is a 2nd-year high school student and president of the literature club. Hinae appears to be a trendy, stylish, and energetic girl who likes to tease around with people and read books most of the time. However, in contrast to her cheery personality, Hinae is quite perceptive of the affairs in her surroundings and of people's hidden feelings. She can wear a much more serious appeal at times, and sometimes gets fed up with pretending to be interested in artificial and boring talks bet

name: Hinagiku Kayou
description: __Occupation:__ Agent of Spring __Power:__ Life Stimulation Hinagiku went missing for around ten years, taking the season of spring with her. ~!She's been in love with [Rosei](https://anilist.co/character/319955/Rosei-Kantsubaki) since childhood.!~ ~!She later reunites with Rosei and enters a relationship with him. Because she sees herself as a different person from before her kidnapping, Rosei begins calling her 'Hina'—a nickname only he is allowed to use.!~

name: Hisoka Mikage
description: He's a member of the Winter Troupe who joined the Mankai Company after he collapsed in front of the theatre. He has neither home nor any memories of whom he was before he collapsed, besides his own name. However, he is skilled at acting and very light on his feet but can also fall asleep anytime and at any place.

name: Kanae Kotonami
description: Kotonami's character, at first glance, looks like she was being set up to be the villain to Kyōko's angel, but as with all of the female characters in this series, Kanae is much nicer than she appears. While there was fur flying about at the beginning, both girls had a need for a true friend, and are finding that in each other. Kanae desperately wanted to be a star and was at the same audition as Kyōko, but while she did better than Kyōko, she also failed. She became the second member of Love Me

name: Keel
description: __Race:__ Wanui ~!Gender: Female!~ Keel was born and raised in the same village as Raphtalia. Naofumi purchased them as a slave in order to rebuild the village destroyed by the first wave.

Koume tends to have a cheerful disposition when it comes to horror, thinking that zombies are very cute and saying she thinks it's adorable when they trap people. name: Leonardo Sturges
description: Leo is a famous ballet dancer who is taking a leave of absences due to 'sickness'. He ran away to Japan and is currently living with the Aragaki family.

name: Lucky Roux
description: __Height:__ 241 cm (7'11") __Affiliations:__ Red Hair Pirates A rather large bodied man who's a member of "Red-Haired" Shanks' crew, he's always seen eating a piece of meat. He seems to be one of Shanks's most trusted crew members, as he is always seen when the Red Hair Pirates are featured, usually when something crucial happens. name: Manim
description: Madam is the new wife of the village minister. She is initially seen as a beautiful bride, but then is suspected to be a fox when her husband falls sick and the Indangsu river does not allow pass of ships. She is found and saved by Cheong in the river when she falls off a boat that her brother uses to catch 'the golden turtle' which they gift to the minister instead of a dowry. name: Nagisa Ootsuki
description: Mashiro, who sits next to her, bothers her in a number of ways, and in order to improve herself, she pushes herself to confront Mashiro and "like" her. She had previously been unable to make it in time for her preferred school's entrance exam after helping a girl (Mashiro) who had collapsed, so she took an exam for a nearby private high school instead and enrolled there.
